immutable_core.semantic_definition: A positive labeled child episode retaining one row for each continuous ICU-stay interval during which an approved vasoactive agent contributes to vasopressor support, with parent linkage to the broader vasopressor support active episode.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per retained ICU stay agent-specific support episode interval
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_vasopressor_support_agent_episode must preserve positive agent-specific vasopressor support interval semantics, retain agent identity, keep parent any-support linkage explicit, and must not collapse into any vasopressor support active, raw medication infusion event, dose burden, norepinephrine-equivalent dose, shock phenotype, or mortality-risk score.

episode_interval_contract.episode_start_rule: start at the approved agent-specific support interval start after source-faithful course merging
episode_interval_contract.episode_end_rule: end at the approved agent-specific support interval end after source-faithful course merging
episode_interval_contract.continuity_rule: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous approved source courses only within the same ICU stay and same standardized vasoactive agent; any positive gap or agent change starts a new child episode
episode_interval_contract.parent_link_rule: link every retained child agent episode to exactly one broader std_vasopressor_support_active parent episode by same-stay interval containment
episode_interval_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained positive agent episode under the approved agent-inclusion rule; this does not prove absence of any vasopressor support or uncaptured agent evidence

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_vasopressor_support_agent_episode outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.

version_bump_trigger_examples: adding Amsterdam candidate mapping that retains terlipressin as a source-faithful agent label pending owner review
